label: Transparent amethyst crystal motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Amethyst transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an amethyst crystal motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as one complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A natural amethyst geode cluster with sharp violet quartz points, lavender translucent facets, white crystal bases, charcoal cave-shadow crevices, mineral inclusions, and crisp angular edges. Geological accuracy, premium calm identity, no fruit or floral forms.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include full crystal base and points without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no grape cluster, no fantasy magic glow, no jewelry setting, no hand, no cave landscape, no text, no watermark, no loose gemstones, no other minerals dominating.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Amethyst light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Amethyst", derived from an amethyst crystal cutout. This board is a source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible premium UI theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Amethyst, Amethyst Crystal, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract colors and interaction language from violet quartz points, lavender facets, white crystal bases, charcoal geode shadows, and crisp mineral edges. The board must read as amethyst crystal, not grape, labradorite, or generic purple SaaS.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: calm premium system, 8px radius with slight faceted cuts, quartz-white surfaces, amethyst-violet primary actions, lavender muted panels, charcoal borders, crystal-white highlights, precise grid, subtle mineral grain texture, angular divider accents.
Constraints: no grapes, no wine, no magical fantasy symbols, no generic purple/blue gradients, no neon glow, no unrelated saturated colors, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Amethyst", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Amethyst dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Amethyst". It must feel like the light-mode board translated to dark mode and remain derived from the amethyst crystal cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Amethyst, Amethyst Crystal, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve amethyst-violet active states, lavender facets, quartz-white text, charcoal geode surfaces, crystal-edge dividers, mineral grain texture, calm premium spacing, and 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. Must read as amethyst, not grape or labradorite.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: cave-charcoal dark backgrounds, shadow-charcoal cards, quartz-white foreground, amethyst-violet buttons, lavender charts, crisp crystal borders, subtle faceted shadows and mineral speckle overlays.
Constraints: no grapes, no fantasy magic UI, no neon violet, no pure-black-only flat background, no generic purple/blue gradients, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Amethyst".
